notes: Adapted from original evals 1, 2, 4 using real available data. No baseline runs — with-skill only. See docs/research/phase-0-execution-plan.md for rationale.

evals.name: full-review-with-copilot-triage
evals.prompt: PR #179 리뷰해줘. docs/pr-for-review/[PR-179] fix- full adversarial review for multiple stories.md 파일이고, repo는 junyoung2015/jjp, 브랜치는 fix/full-adversarial-review-from-20260218, 작성자는 junyoung2015야. --review-source copilot 로 처리해.
evals.expected_output: A structured review document with git-truth validation, scope-aware deep code review as primary section, Copilot triage as secondary section, and developer feedback in Korean. Developer profile created.
files: docs/pr-for-review/[PR-179] fix- full adversarial review for multiple stories.md
docs/pr-for-review/[PR-179] fix- full adversarial review for multiple stories.review-data.json
assertions: Review document saved to docs/reviews/ with PR-179 or ticket-based filename
Developer profile created at docs/reviews/developers/junyoung2015.md
스코프 확인 section present if OUT_OF_SCOPE files detected, omitted cleanly otherwise
PR 기술 검증 section with verification table comparing PR claims to actual git diff
코드 리뷰 결과 section appears ABOVE AI 리뷰 코멘트 검증 section
코드 리뷰 결과 contains at least 3 substantive findings from independent code analysis
Findings use dual classification: Fix-Self/Pass-to-Creator AND severity (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW)
코드 리뷰 결과 includes severity summary line (총 X건: HIGH A건 / MEDIUM B건 / LOW C건)
AI 리뷰 코멘트 검증 section triages all 4 available Copilot inline comments
Review contains triage categories: Fix-Self, Pass-to-Creator, and/or Dismissed
Fix-Self items include severity emoji and concrete one-line fix descriptions
Pass-to-Creator items include educational Korean explanations with structure
Feedback section contains 잘한 점 (Strengths) before 학습 포인트 (Learning Points)
Developer profile has categorized entries (at least 3 distinct categories)
Review shows evidence of reading actual source code (file:line references from real diff)
Korean language used for all feedback with English technical terms preserved
At least one finding identifies a real code concern beyond style nits
Git-truth verification table lists files that actually appear in the diff

evals.name: quick-mode-review
evals.prompt: PR #179 퀵 리뷰해줘 --quick. docs/pr-for-review/[PR-179] fix- full adversarial review for multiple stories.md 파일이고, repo는 junyoung2015/jjp, 브랜치는 fix/full-adversarial-review-from-20260218, 작성자는 junyoung2015야.
evals.expected_output: A quick review with git-truth validation and deep code review but NO AI review triage section and NO developer history update. Faster and more focused output.
files: docs/pr-for-review/[PR-179] fix- full adversarial review for multiple stories.md
assertions: Review document saved to docs/reviews/ with PR-179 or ticket-based filename
PR 기술 검증 section with verification table
코드 리뷰 결과 contains substantive findings from independent code analysis, OR if repo access unavailable: review explicitly discloses limitation and findings are labeled as doc-based/API-diff-based
Review does NOT contain an AI 리뷰 코멘트 검증 section (skipped in quick mode)
Review does NOT create or update developer profile (skipped in quick mode)
Review is noticeably shorter and more focused than a full review
Korean language used for all feedback with English technical terms preserved
Findings reference specific file:line locations from the actual diff, OR if repo access unavailable: review clearly labels findings as unverified against source code

evals.name: zero-provider-standalone-review
evals.prompt: MOVE-643 PR 리뷰해줘. docs/pr-for-review/[MOVE-643] 장소 추가 날짜 선택 페이지 v2.md 파일이고, --repo-path /Users/eddie/Desktop/demodev/moving-frontend, 브랜치는 MOVE-643/place-select-day-v2, 작성자는 626-ju야. --worktree auto 로 처리해.
evals.expected_output: A full review with substantive code findings despite 0 AI review comments. The review's substance comes from independent deep code analysis, not provider triage. Git-truth validation table present. Developer profile created.
files: docs/pr-for-review/[MOVE-643] 장소 추가 날짜 선택 페이지 v2.md
assertions: Review document saved to docs/reviews/MOVE-643-review.md
Developer profile created/updated at docs/reviews/developers/626-ju.md
PR 기술 검증 section with git-truth validation table
코드 리뷰 결과 contains substantive findings (at least 2) from independent code analysis with severity classification
Review does NOT collapse or produce hollow output despite 0 provider comments
Review shows evidence of reading actual source code (file:line references from real diff)
코드 리뷰 결과 appears as primary section (no AI triage section, or gracefully empty)
Korean language used for all feedback with English technical terms preserved
At least one finding identifies a real code concern beyond style nits
